challenges.title: Resource Links
challenges.description: Create an HTML <head> section containing a <link> to a stylesheet (rel="stylesheet") and a <link> for a favicon (rel="icon"). Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '<head' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <head> element'
assert '</head>' in html.lower(), 'Should close the <head> element'
assert '<link' in html.lower(), 'Should contain <link> elements'
assert 'rel="stylesheet"' in html.lower() or "rel='stylesheet'" in html.lower(), 'Should have a link with rel="stylesheet"'
assert 'rel="icon"' in html.lower() or "rel='icon'" in html.lower(), 'Should have a link with rel="icon"'
assert html.lower().count('href=') >= 2, 'Both link elements should have href attributes'
hints: Use <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css"> for a stylesheet
Use <link rel="icon" href="favicon.ico"> for a favicon

challenges.title: Preloading
challenges.description: Create an HTML <head> section with: a stylesheet link (rel="stylesheet"), a preload link for a font (rel="preload"), and a link with rel="icon". The preload link should include an as attribute. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '<head' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <head> element'
assert '</head>' in html.lower(), 'Should close the <head> element'
assert 'rel="stylesheet"' in html.lower() or "rel='stylesheet'" in html.lower(), 'Should have a link with rel="stylesheet"'
assert 'rel="preload"' in html.lower() or "rel='preload'" in html.lower(), 'Should have a link with rel="preload"'
assert 'rel="icon"' in html.lower() or "rel='icon'" in html.lower(), 'Should have a link with rel="icon"'
assert 'as=' in html.lower(), 'Preload link should have an as attribute'
hints: The as attribute tells the browser what type of resource is being preloaded
